calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-10-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Dougherty for Allan Simmons.

Mr. Dougherty stated that the only issue was with the $2,500.00 assignment to him. The Court informed Mr. Dougherty that if he wanted extraordinary fees, that he would have to file an amended petition. Mr. Douhgerty suggested that the Administrator receive full payment and that the portion of the order referring to the $2,500.00 be stricken. The Court granted the petition, (subject to review of the revised written order).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Wendy Pun, CSR#12891. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-07-2009 Continued To Aug-10-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-03-2007 Granted Per Written Order
